infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: The Hedge uses your location to provide weather-aware activity suggestions for your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Hedge uses the camera to let you capture photos of your child's activities for their learning portfolio.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Hedge accesses your photo library to let you add photos to activity logs and your child's learning portfolio.

plugins.photosPermission: The Hedge needs access to your photos to add evidence to portfolios.
plugins.cameraPermission: The Hedge needs access to your camera to capture activity photos.
